author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Yozakura-san Chi no Daisakusen 2nd Season' Second Cour Announced for Fall 2026
The 12th and final episode of Yozakura-san Chi no Daisakusen 2nd Season (Mission: Yozakura Family Season 2) ended with the announcement of a second cour on Sunday. The official website also revealed an announcement promotional video. The second cour is scheduled to premiere on MBS and TBS in October 2026. Produced by Silver Link., the first season adapting Hitsuji Gondaira's action comedy manga aired in April 2024. Hulu it streamed with subtitles and later with an English dub, while Disney+...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
WIT Studio Produces 'LONA' Original TV Anime for Spring 2027
An official website opened for an original television anime titled LONA (Laboratory of Optics and Neural Analysis) on Sunday, revealing the main cast, production staff, three teaser visuals (pictured), and a teaser promotional video. Produced by Wit Studio, the sci-fi original anime is scheduled to premiere in April 2027. Cast Mugen: Fuuka Izumi (Kill Ao) Sango: Anna Nagase (Needy Girl Overdose) Ao: Minako Kotobuki (Ghost Concert: Missing Songs) Staff Director: Takashi Katagiri (Spy x Family Mov...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Diamond no Ace: Act II Second Season' Second Cour Announced for Fall 2026
The official website of the Diamond no Ace (Ace of Diamond) anime series announced the second cour of the Diamond no Ace: Act II Second Season (Ace of Diamond Act II Season 2) anime on Sunday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured). The second cour is scheduled to premiere on TV Tokyo networks and AT-X in October 2026. Production I.G and Madhouse adapted Diamond no Ace into two anime seasons in Fall 2013 and Spring 2015. Crunchyroll streamed both seasons with subtitles. The Diamond no Ace: Act II...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Tsue to Tsurugi no Wistoria' Gets Third Season
The 12th and final episode of Tsue to Tsurugi no Wistoria Season 2 (Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2) ended with an announcement that a third season is in production. The official website also revealed an announcement promo and celebratory visual (pictured above). Produced by Actas and Bandai Namco Pictures, the first season adapting Fujino Omori and Toshi Aoi's action fantasy manga began aired in Summer 2024. The second season debuted on April 12.
